zh.lifeSummary: 當Reynold Grey於1322年出生在威爾士丹比爾盧時，他的父親Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton11歲，母親Maud de Botetourt7歲。他和Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1388年9月4日在英國威爾斯丹比爾盧享年66歲，埋葬在威爾士丹比爾盧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reynold Grey于1322年出生在威尔士丹比爾盧时，他的父亲Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton11岁，母亲Maud de Botetourt7岁。他和Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1388年9月4日在英国威尔斯丹比爾盧享年66岁，埋葬在威尔士丹比爾盧。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Reynold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Reinald, Reynaud, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + wald ‘ruler’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them into England. In modern use, the given name sometimes represents a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman personal name.

en.lifeSummary: When Reynold Grey was born in 1322, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, was 11 and his mother, Maud de Botetourt, was 7. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn. He died on 4 September 1388, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reynold Grey est né en 1322, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Maud de Botetourt, avait 7 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn. Il est décédé le 4 septembre 1388, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reynold Grey 1322 in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton 11 und seine Mutter Maud de Botetourt 7. Er hatte mit Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 4. September 1388 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold Grey è nato il nel 1322 nel Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, il suo padre, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, aveva 11 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Botetourt, aveva 7 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn. Morì il 4 settembre 1388, nel Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Reynold Greyが1322年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインで生まれた時，父Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wiltonは11歳，母Maud de Botetourtは7歳であった。彼はLady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthynとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1388年9月4日にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインで66歳で死去し，ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reynold Grey(이)가 1322년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton(은)는 11세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Botetourt(은)는 7세였다. 그는 Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 9월 4일 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold Grey nasceu em 1322, em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Botetourt, tinha 7 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn. Ele faleceu em 4 de setembro de 1388, em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reynold Grey родился в 1322 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Botetourt, 7. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn. Он умер 4 сентября 1388 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reynold Grey nació en 1322, en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, su papá, Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Maud de Botetourt, tenía 7 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn. Murió el 4 de septiembre de 1388, en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales.
